certificate.description: The Amazon Linux 2023 Kernel Cryptographic API provides cryptographic services to Linux kernel space software components and user space via the AF_ALG interface.

By calling the appropriate zeroization functions: AES Key: crypto_free_skcipher and crypto_free_aead HMAC Key: crypto_free_shash and crypto_free_ahash Internal State (V, Key), Internal State (V, C): crypto_free_rng DH Public Key & DH Private Key: crypto_free_kpp EC Public Key & EC Private Key: crypto_free_kpp RSA Public Key: public_key_free
